task: Find the cheapest 2 bed and 3+ bath apartment listing for rent in New York.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully used Compass to search rentals in New York, applied filters for exactly 2 beds and 3+ baths, sorted by price, and then validated the cheapest qualifying listing. Although the first sorted result at $3,150 appeared to be a data artifact (1 full + 9 half baths), the agent continued checking results and confirmed the first genuine qualifying listing. Evidence on the results page showed sorted listings with prices and bath counts, and the final opened listing page for 47-44 Springfield Boulevard (https://www.compass.com/homedetails/47-44-Springfield-Blvd-Queens-NY-11361/20JZ4N_pid/) showed $3,650, 2 Beds, 4 Baths. Additional fetched structured data showed 3 full baths + 1 half bath, satisfying the 3+ bath requirement. Therefore the task was completed.
final_result_response:
I rechecked the sorted Compass results and skipped the data-artifact listings.

**Cheapest genuine 2-bed, 3+ full-bath rental I found:**

**47-44 Springfield Boulevard, Bayside, Queens**  
- **Price:** $3,650/month  
- **Beds:** 2  
- **Baths:** 4 total, with **3 full baths + 1 half bath** in Compass structured data  
- **Size:** 2,270 sq ft  
- **Listing:** https://www.compass.com/homedetails/47-44-Springfield-Blvd-Queens-NY-11361/20JZ4N_pid/

I opened and confirmed the listing page. Compass shows it as **2 beds / 4 baths**.
action_history: Opening Compass: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.compass.com/');
Searching rentals in New York: await page.locator('e10').click();
Searching rentals in New York: await page.locator('e12').fill('New York, NY');
Selecting New York suggestion: await page.locator('e146').click();
Opening filters: await page.locator('e15').click();
Opening beds picker: await page.locator('e267').click();
Setting minimum beds: await page.locator('e392').click();
Setting maximum beds: await page.locator('e268').click();
Selecting maximum beds: await page.locator('e454').click();
Setting minimum baths: await page.locator('e271').click();
Increasing baths to three: await page.locator('e271').click();
Increasing baths to three: await page.locator('e271').click();
Finishing bath filter: for (let i=0;i<2;i++) { await page.locator('e271').click(); let sx= await snapshot(page); console.log('click '+(i+1)); console.log(sx.diff || sx.tree); }
Returning baths to 3+: await page.locator('e269').click();
Applying filters: await page.locator('e326').click();
Opening sort options: await page.locator('e749').click();
Sorting by price: await page.locator('e882').click();
Opening cheapest listing details: await page.locator('e957').click();
Opening Hoover Avenue listing: await page.locator('e25').click();
Opening first valid 3-full-bath listing: await page.locator('e31').click();
